title: AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DOLORES, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 841 / 62 OG No. 21, 3542 (May 23, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4213, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CREATING CERTAIN BARRIOS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF DOLORES, PROVINCE OF SAMAR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Bagongbong and Cabago-an in the Municipality of Dolores, Province of Samar, are converted into barrios of said municipality, to be known as the barrios of Bagongbong and Cabago-an, respectively.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
